name: College Applications
description: Workflow templates for reviewing public college application and admissions pages.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Find application deadline
workflows.description: A student tries to find the deadline for an application or program.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Start application
workflows.description: A student tries to locate the application entry point and begin the process.
required_actions: Find apply or start application link
Confirm the first application step is reachable
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Upload required document
workflows.description: An applicant tries to find a document upload control and understand accepted requirements.
required_actions: Reach upload review state without submitting real data
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Find financial aid information
workflows.description: A student tries to find financial aid, fee waiver, or support information.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Reach application confirmation
workflows.description: An applicant tries to move through a sample or permitted flow until a review or confirmation page.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
